# AX Developments

AX Developments is a UAE web design agency founded by Ahmed Abdelmonem for small businesses that need a practical website, booking flow, online store, or mobile app without managing technical work themselves. The agency focuses on Abu Dhabi and the wider United Arab Emirates.

AX Developments serves cafes, salons, clinics, cake shops, florists, barbershops, restaurants, car detailing businesses, pet groomers, medical centers, and other UAE service businesses. The core approach is demo-first: AX studies a business, its Instagram presence, its Google visibility and its competitors, then shows a working website direction before a long discovery process.

Core services include mobile-first website design, WhatsApp-focused booking flows, inquiry forms, online booking with payments, e-commerce stores, admin dashboards, mobile apps, hosting, SSL, basic SEO, Google Search Console setup on Growth and above, and monthly upkeep.

Actual public package pricing:

- Starter website: AED 600 setup, then AED 399 per month
- Growth website: AED 1,200 setup, then AED 549 per month
- Premium booking/database website: AED 4,000+ setup, then AED 999 per month
- Commerce store: AED 8,000+ setup, then AED 1,799 per month
- Mobile app: AED 18,000+ setup, then AED 2,499 per month
- Arabic bilingual version add-on: AED 400 setup, then AED 75 per month

All packages state a 3-month minimum. Setup fees are non-refundable. The customer's domain stays in the customer's name.

Contact is available via WhatsApp at https://wa.me/971547502923, company email at infoaxdevelopment@gmail.com, and founder email at ahmedashraf1796@gmail.com.
